description_long: This is a large, multifunctional wooden wall unit featuring a central desk area flanked by tall cabinets and multiple shelves. The unit is primarily constructed from light wood with a natural grain finish, complemented by white panel doors and drawer fronts. The central workspace includes a spacious desktop, a pull-out keyboard tray, and a mobile pedestal with drawers on wheels. Above the desk, there are open shelves and closed cabinets for additional storage, while the side towers offer a combination of open shelving and closed compartments. Metal handles are visible on the doors and drawers, enhancing accessibility. The overall design is modern and practical, suitable for use in offices, home studies, or public urban interiors.
description: A large, light wood and white wall unit with a central desk, multiple shelves, cabinets, and a mobile drawer pedestal. It features both open and closed storage with metal handles for easy access.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical structure, white panel doors, central desk, and mobile pedestal.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the unit and the curved profile of the side panels.
description_view_2: Rear-front view displaying all open shelves, drawers, and cabinet doors, highlighting storage options.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the curved side profile and depth of the unit.
